title: ophrys atrata var. incubacea
intro: Ophrys atrata var. incubacea, also known as the incubus orchid, is a rare and unique species of orchid that belongs to the Ophrys genus. Traditionally, the incubus orchid has been used in folk medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, soothing digestive issues, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of the incubus orchid are typically made by infusing the plant's leaves and roots in hot water, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses and effects.
